steps.t: The bottles can be found at the entrance to the Haunted Burrow. You should use the correct bottle to navigate to the entrance to the Creeping Wing -- …
The entrance to the Cobwebbed Wing is at the other end of the Main Cellar. You must make it to the entrance to the Cobwebbed Wing before the time runs…
The potion bottles that will enable you to move through the Cobwebbed Wing are at the entrance to the wing. You should examine the clue and select the…
The door to the Creeping Wing is somewhere in the Cobwebbed Wing. You should get to the door of the Creeping Wing before the time expires.
The bottles can be found at the entrance to the Creeping Wing in the Haunted Burrow. You should use the correct bottle to navigate to the exit of the …
The door to the basement is the exit to the Creeping Wing. You should seek the exit to the Creeping Wing before the time runs out.
The bottles can be found at the entrance to the Basement in the Haunted Burrow. You should use the correct bottle to navigate to the exit of the Basem…
The door to the Main Cellar is at the other end of the basement. You should return to the Main Cellar as quickly as you can.
The exit to the Party Tree is the door that let you into the Haunted Burrow. You should find your way back to the Main Entrance.
Adalgrim Goodbody stands outside the Haunted Burrow, near the Party Tree. You should return to Adalgrim Goodbody with news of your success at the ridd…
